corners.name: La Source
corners.notes: Tight hairpin after S/F. Massive overtaking hotspot on lap 1.

corners.name: Eau Rouge
corners.notes: One of the most famous corners in motorsport. Blind left compression at the bottom of the hill.

corners.name: Raidillon
corners.notes: The uphill right following Eau Rouge. Taken flat in modern F1.

corners.name: Kemmel Straight chicane (Les Combes)
corners.notes: End of the Kemmel Straight. DRS detection.

corners.name: Les Combes T1
corners.notes: Braking zone at top of the hill.

corners.name: Rivage
corners.notes: Tight hairpin, slow section before the Pouhon.

corners.name: Pouhon
corners.notes: Double-apex high-speed left. One of the most demanding corners.

corners.name: Blanchimont
corners.notes: Flat-out high-speed left sweep. Very fast in modern F1.

corners.name: Bus Stop Chicane T1
corners.notes: Final chicane before start/finish. Heavy braking from 290+ km/h.
